title: Casti Tholon

{{Quote|Casti presents more of a threat to us not because of her skills, but because of her extreme loyalty to Barosa.|Sisquoc, in a Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex file on Casti Tholon|<ref name="AIR" />}}
'''Casti Tholon''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Scout/Legends|scout]]. [[Homeworld/Legends|Hailing]] from the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] [[Sardoran]], she was raised by [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] foster [[Parent/Legends|parents]] on a [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]] [[Unidentified Duros space city|space city]] where she only knew Duros and their culture, to the point where she considered herself a Duros and felt more comfortable among them instead of Humans. Tholon enrolled in the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], where she became the favorite student and very close friend of the school's head, [[Barosa Warren]].

The pair went on to go on numerous exploration and [[Map/Legends|charting]] trips, and after graduation, Tholon also became a successful scout on her own, discovering and mapping many previously unknown locations throughout [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] and the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], including a valuable [[Mining/Legends|mining]] planet that the [[Rim Commercial Mining]] company named after [[Tholon]] after her. By [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Tholon was employed by [[Mero-Nepp Ores]] and was considered a threat by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] due to her intense loyalty to Warren, who had become an enemy of the Alliance.

==Biography==
{{Quote|Any attempts to alleviate the current hostilities between GOSS and the Alliance's Eclipse Team will surely see Casti play an active role.|Sisquoc, in a Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex file on Casti Tholon|<ref name="AIR" />}}
Casti Tholon was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] from [[Sardoran]],<ref name="AIR" /> a [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|419|Ord}} states that the term "[[Ordnance/Regional Depot/Legends|Ordnance/Regional Depot]]" and the abbreviation "Ord," as used in the name "Ord Sardoran" applied by ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' to Sardoran, applied to certain [[Planet/Legends|worlds]] [[Colonist/Legends|settled]] by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].</ref> located in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].<ref name="EAOC Core">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Sardoran system/Legends|Sardoran]] and [[Duro system/Legends|Duro systems]]</ref> She grew up on a [[Unidentified Duros space city|space city]] of the [[Duros/Legends|Duros]] [[Species/Legends|species]] located in<ref name="AIR" /> the Core Worlds'<ref name="EAOC Core" /> [[Duro system/Legends|Duro system]]. There, she was raised by Duros foster [[Parent/Legends|parents]] and grew up among Duros, to the point where she experienced a stronger connection to members of that species than to other Humans. Tholon eventually enrolled in the [[Galactic Outdoor Survival School/Legends|Galactic Outdoor Survival School]], where she became one of the favorite students of the school's head, the [[Morellian]] [[Barosa Warren]]. Together with Warren, Tholon [[Scout/Legends|explored]] and [[Map/Legends|charted]] instances of nearly every type of climate, including such<ref name="AIR" /> [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]<ref name="EAOC WildSpace">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[The Clar system/Legends|The Clar]], [[Corg system/Legends|Corg]], [[Tholon system/Legends|Tholon]], and [[Kur Minor system/Legends|Kur Minor systems]]</ref> locales as the [[Water/Legends|ice]]-swept plains of the [[Vivab deserts]] on the celestial body known as [[the Clar]] and the dangerous [[Asteroid field/Legends|asteroid fields]] of the [[Corg system/Legends|Corg system]].<ref name="AIR" />

[[File:Barosa_Warren.png|thumb|right|300px|Casti Tholon became a close friend of her instructor, Barosa Warren.]]
After graduating from the Galactic Outdoor Survival School, Tholon dedicated her life to exploration. Throughout Wild Space and the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]], she discovered and charted many planets and other previously unknown locations. While employed by [[Rim Commercial Mining]], Tholon discovered her first world,<ref name="AIR" /> a Wild Space<ref name="EAOC WildSpace" /> planet that was found to have extensive deposits of various [[Ore/Legends|ores]]. The discovery turned out to be highly profitable for the company, establishing it as one of the leading [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Mining/Legends|mining]] enterprises. Rim Commercial Mining subsequently named the planet [[Tholon]] after the scout, and,<ref name="AIR" /> by [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],<ref name="Date">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'' represents a collection of [[in-universe]] reports from "one [[Standard year/Legends|year]] before the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]," which corresponds to [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], according to ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''.</ref> that world had been her most important find. At some point in her career, Tholon also trekked through the [[Kur forests]]<ref name="AIR" /> of<ref name="Planetnamia">{{Planetnamia|other=the [[Kur forests]]|system=[[Kur Minor system/Legends|Kur Minor system]]|legends=1}}</ref> Wild Space's [[Kur Minor system/Legends|Kur Minor system]].<ref name="EAOC WildSpace" /> During that trip, she suffered severe cuts by the [[Forest/Legends|forests']] [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[thorn vine]]s, acquiring numerous scars on her head, [[Limb/Legends|arms]], and lower legs.<ref name="AIR" />

By 2 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> Tholon was employed by the company [[Mero-Nepp Ores]] and had few opportunities to meet Warren. By that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Task Force on Alliance Security]] [[SecuriDex]] [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] was submitted on Warren and his associates, which included Tholon. The Alliance considered the Morellian a threat due to a personal vendetta he pursued against his former student and Rebel [[Sisquoc]] and his Alliance allies, and, in a personal addendum to the datafile, Sisquoc noted that Tholon specifically presented a threat due to her intense loyalty to Warren.<ref name="AIR" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|Should we ever be successful in eliminating Barosa as a threat, Casti's vengeance would surely be fierce.|Sisquoc, in a Rebel Task Force on Alliance Security SecuriDex file on Casti Tholon|<ref name="AIR" />}}
Casti Tholon was a [[Color/Legends|light]]-skinned Human with dark [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. She kept her head clean-shaven, and numerous black scars were present on her scalp, arms, and lower legs. As a youth, she only knew Duros and their culture, and, by the time she was an adult, she considered herself a Duros, feeling out of place among Humans and being most comfortable when in the company of other Duros. In contrast to the average Duros, however, Tholon was very contentious and overbearing. She had a very forceful personality and, when in a group, easily assumed leadership.<ref name="AIR" />

Nevertheless, Tholon was affected by the Duros culture. She likely gained from her foster parents a natural curiosity about [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], and, continuing to fulfill her yearnings, over time she became a scout by nature, devoting her life to discovery and to her work. Those qualities led to Tholon having a very close friendship with Barosa Warren, to whom she was extremely loyal. Warren's friendly and adversial relationships both automatically also extended to Tholon, and it was speculated by Rebel Alliance member Sisquoc that, should the Alliance successfully neutralize Warren as a threat, the Human scout would exact fierce vengeance.<ref name="AIR" />

==Skills and abilities==
Casti Tholon possessed legendary scouting abilities and, together with her instructor Barosa Warren, constituted a particularly impressive explorer team. Her physical skills included a good stamina, being able to run long distances and swim, as well as climbing, jumping, and brawling abilities. Tholon was able to ride animals as well as operate both [[Repulsorcraft/Legends|repulsorcraft]] and [[Starship/Legends|starships]], and she was also skilled at [[Astrogation/Legends|astrogation]], first aid, and [[Computer/Legends|computer]] [[Programmer/Legends|programming]] and repair. She was also a perceptive person, being good at bargaining, stealth, and investigation. Tholon's knowledge covered survival in environments such as forests, [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]], and [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] as well as planetary systems and various [[Alien/Legends|alien]] species, cultures—including that of the Duros—and [[Language/Legends|languages]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Equipment==
Casti Tholon was equipped with a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]], a [[Hunting blaster/Legends|hunting blaster]], a [[Machete/Legends|machete]], and a carving [[Knife/Legends|knife]]. She also carried a single-person [[Tent/Legends|survival tent]], [[Macrobinoculars/Legends|macrobinoculars]], twenty-five [[Meter/Legends|meters]] of [[Syntherope/Legends|syntherope]], [[Ration pack/Legends|rations]], five [[Flare/Legends|flares]], and a [[Glowrod/Legends|glowrod]]. At one point, Tholon wore a dark-colored [[shirt]] and [[Glove/Legends|gloves]] and carried a [[Backpack/Legends|backpack]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Behind the scenes==
Casti Tholon was introduced in ''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]'', a [[1995]] sourcebook for [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. In the book, she was illustrated by [[Mike Vilardi]].<ref name="AIR" />

==Sources==
